name: Slime Labs
short_description: You are a slime trying to traverse the labs with your ability to jump, shoot, control projectile speed, and equip fancy hats and weapons what could possibly go wrong.
detailed_description:
Description


You take the role of a Slime going through the experiments in the Slime Labs. In this game you will have to jump, shoot, and control your projectile speed in order to progress further and further through the labs. This game is a arena fighter with the climbing portion of the game, but also has many other challenges through the dark rooms which have no light that must be traversed by absorbing a glowing substance to see your way through. After you progress to a certain point you will start getting hats and weapons to upgrade and make higher rooms possible.

Stage 2


Stage 2 is being worked on along with bug fixes that may have been missed.
